name: Job Market Trust Infrastructure Model
author: Market Catalyst - Job Market
description: Job Market Trust Infrastructure: structured hiring transparency, promises, reviews, and verification.

entities.name: application
entities.brief: Job application submitted by an applicant
entities.description:
Structured record of a job application submission. Tracks when applications
were submitted and links to timeline events (responses, interviews, outcomes).
This is the core data point for tracking hiring process transparency.

fields.name: job_posting_id
fields.description: Reference to the job posting this application is for

fields.name: submitted_datetime
fields.description: Full date and time of submission

fields.name: applicant_id
fields.description: Anonymous or pseudonymous applicant identifier (for privacy)

fields.name: timeline
fields.description: Timeline events for this application (nested children)

fields.name: review_id
fields.description: Reference to review created from this application experience
